description_long: This object is a circular band, likely a bracelet, with a distinctive textured outer edge that appears to have a rough, almost fuzzy or bristled finish. The band is uniformly black and has a consistent width throughout its circumference. The outer surface is adorned with irregular protrusions, giving it a unique, tactile appearance reminiscent of a rugged or organic motif. The inner surface is smooth and unadorned, designed for comfortable contact with the skin. The overall form is simple yet striking, with the decorative texture providing visual interest and a sense of individuality. There are no visible gemstones or metallic highlights, emphasizing the monochromatic and textural design.
description: A black circular bracelet with a rough, bristled outer texture and a smooth inner band. Its unique, organic surface detail gives it a bold and tactile appearance.
description_view_0: From this side view, the bracelet appears as a thin, flat band with a pronounced, irregular texture along the edge.
description_view_1: This angled view reveals the full circular shape and highlights the rough, bristled texture on the outer rim.
description_view_2: The top-down view shows the complete ring form, emphasizing the even distribution of the textured embellishments around the circumference.
description_view_3: Another angled perspective, similar to view 1, displaying the consistent width and the organic, uneven surface detail.
